| Dear Patriot,
How are you starting your Labor Day weekend?
I want to invite you to join me and Lehigh County Commissioner Marty Nothstein for a morning of shooting clays Friday, August 30th at Lehigh Valley Sporting Clays.
We want to kick off the Labor Day weekend by working to keep Lehigh County RED and Take Back The House from Rep. Susan Wild on November 3rd, 2020!
What: Sporting Clays Shoot with Congressional Candidate Dean Brown and Commissioner Marty Nothstein
Where: Lehigh Valley Sporting Clays at 2750 Limestone St. Coplay, PA
When: Friday, August 30th, 2019 8:30 AM Registration 9:00 AM Shoot Begins 12:00 PM Lunch
[If you would like to attend please RSVP with one of the following options below and click here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oySmZtl3YsYIqCfyHZc-SNWkjpH9YgamMbsX5kFOaUDyMZhaArS9A424ebyq0E654VmT4wKS9MDNE7LrfCIAOxxwpqL8kGVEAeZk6vtZIuHhh924tgA2p7Vepwc8yfrtm3i2Zancn4oWLxwUnbpPZXhl8WOS5TlxB0zdV5iz27v0-LGexoDkKQ==&c=8mVlARW_kI5lytwuoT31IQdFCfRexNPjQq35Lq11Uo6vJgoQJ_zeMA==&ch=N69Iryzm1TKzjaWxi4kxAiM-BuvIhjswcEX2ZGLklzPPnnOTmRbqGw==).

Level Information
FINANCE COMMITTEE \- $2,000 INCLUDES 12 SHOOTERS PLUS ADMISSION AND LISTING FOR ALL FUTURE EVENTS. PLEASE COMPLETE THE SHOOTER INFORMATION FORM ENCLOSED AND LET US KNOW THE NAME OF YOUR SHOOTERS BY 8/28/2019
HOST COMMITTEE \- $1,000 INCLUDES 6 SHOOTERS PLUS ADMISSION AND LISTING FOR ALL FUTURE EVENTS. PLEASE COMPLETE THE SHOOTER INFORMATION FORM ENCLOSED AND LET US KNOW THE NAME OF YOUR SHOOTERS BY 8/28/2019
EVENT COMMITTEE \- $700 INCLUDES 4 SHOOTERS PLUS ADMISSION AND LISTING FOR ALL FUTURE EVENTS. PLEASE COMPLETE THE SHOOTER INFORMATION FORM ENCLOSED AND LET US KNOW THE NAME OF YOUR SHOOTERS BY 8/28/2019
PER SHOOTER \- $185 PLEASE COMPLETE THE SHOOTER INFORMATION FORM ENCLOSED AND LET US KNOW THE NAME OF YOUR SHOOTER BY 8/28/2019
Again, please contact my staff with any questions (484) 550-6550 or email [staff@browningforcongress.com](mailto:staff@browningforcongress.com)!!
I hope to see you, Patriot Friday, August 30th at Lehigh Valley Sporting Clays.
I believe it will be a great way to kick off the Labor Day weekend, shoot clays, and work to Take Back The House and keep Lehigh County RED!!
[So come join me to help defeat Left-Wing Susan Wild and have some fun while we are at it!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oySmZtl3YsYIqCfyHZc-SNWkjpH9YgamMbsX5kFOaUDyMZhaArS9A424ebyq0E654VmT4wKS9MDNE7LrfCIAOxxwpqL8kGVEAeZk6vtZIuHhh924tgA2p7Vepwc8yfrtm3i2Zancn4oWLxwUnbpPZXhl8WOS5TlxB0zdV5iz27v0-LGexoDkKQ==&c=8mVlARW_kI5lytwuoT31IQdFCfRexNPjQq35Lq11Uo6vJgoQJ_zeMA==&ch=N69Iryzm1TKzjaWxi4kxAiM-BuvIhjswcEX2ZGLklzPPnnOTmRbqGw==)

I look forward to seeing you there!

clean_body: = Peter, The spotlight is being turned onto our race! "On Election Night, McCaul was shocked, confident in the polling that showed him winning with about 57% of the vote against Mike Siegel, an attorney for Austin and first-time congressional candidate, rather than the four-point nail biter it was." Our campaign worked hard to put the heat on McCaul. We started in a district no one thought was winnable and turned it into a hotly-contested national battleground. Now, we are ready to finish the job. It took a campaign like ours, that fought for progressive values and stood up for working people, to make the difference. Let's flip this seat! We are turning up the pressure on McCaul. In the last month, four Texas GOP colleagues threw in the towel — because of the momentum we have on our side. McCaul still thinks he can hold on but we are going to prove him wrong with your help! subject: AMERICA FIRST

body:
Do you support President Trump’s new policy? |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f7af4e20c872716cb547494b4344608e1285a8fc6f8b600b19e6f1ca978dd6be7da8b3f97f5f7ab0d55050cb902e0afe72c7153d0801cf67)
---

Friend,

The American people elected President Trump because he promised to put America First, and that's exactly what he's done during his time in office.
* He promised he'd BUILD THE WALL...it's under construction
* He promised he'd deport illegal criminals...they're being deported
* He promised he'd fix our broken immigration system...and he's doing just that

He recently announced a new immigration policy to ensure that non-citizens can no longer abuse a broken system and take advantage of _AMERICANS '_ public benefits. So important!

People who want to immigrate to the United States should be required to work and support themselves financially rather than relying on _YOUR_ taxpayer dollars.

Do you agree with President Trump?

**[Take our Official Immigration Reform Poll NOW to let President Trump know what you think of his new policy.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f7af4e20c872716cde697c76f746459a1e4201b11dd4fe6f38c6efbd1a2f46ea21c67e7b23ff1ec53fd1c05888a7365bfcad032ef414ec43)**

REGISTRATION NUMBER: 6124335
SURVEY RESPONSE: ****PENDING** ******************************[**Do you believe there are better uses for your tax dollars than providing government benefits to illegal immigrants?

O Yes

O No**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f7af4e20c872716c92c59b961a2749ef067782d31f42448e7514865a9af52ca575fdc2291b15d90d03e302097b24e892f9627b92641a0baf)****************************** ********[TAKE THE POLL NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f7af4e20c872716cb6377f1bf03dc58c9f69ac21bc73268154e0356f8ff5a1164e3ada31386d35eb7f996d482a828ea607cbafc87173e7bd)********
_Attention: Please take the survey by 11:59 PM tonight to be sure your answers are recorded: **[https://action.donaldjtrump.com/official-immigration-reform](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f7af4e20c872716c3bdb017cf95064b4f0ec2817ebd9922670357e7abbcb8ac1b67dee58912caf573f3fe49f2cf78a7b49ae0955d2f5a282)**_
---
Hard-working Americans across the country are tired of seeing their tax dollars being used to fund healthcare and other government benefits for illegal immigrants.

President Trump is putting an end to that, but he wants your input, Friend.

We'll be sending President Trump the results tomorrow morning, so be sure to respond ASAP to make sure he sees your response.

**[Please take our Official Immigration Reform Poll before 11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f7af4e20c872716cf203546122e638e7634afebd9feda9f0ea1f281cf2c54eb8957e10a6191706b2935b35bdb6756945c25d5cd543414e1b)**

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

name: Robert Foster
subject: Decision
body:
---
| | | | | | Dear Friend,
On August 27th, Mississippians have a decision to make as to who will lead our great state.
There's only one person in this runoff who I know will do the right thing when no one is looking - That is Brigadier General Waller.
He has put public service before politics for his entire career - and I am confident in his ability to put Mississippi families and communities before politics.
[Join me in supporting Justice Waller by making a financial contribution of $5 or what you can afford to help him with the resources he needs to win the runoff election on August, 27th. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U7h-9ibob5W6bs4W96D2qX6-SuqjshU23h4HfFy0MwgMU-YdT5j5tE5Rc9vXwzgnkNX_K97fe79qKH65K8T587NMdowYMcLds4_4say-SF6Aka38KYXDAW64rSltlQRqC9KYQsFzDbAVB0JnLOMfi2WSgJXI46Pt9-HiCjxHQtljIEOiNOHdEw==&c=u7nPQ4CNTMGzhW3R1pLoxHPB7wu-yzbF1fKFkvuu1iJ1VD6sFw8rgQ==&ch=P5GTa6IxHCp9z78V0Yq1XzawsNes_sE3pp8zTpYcShebLURv3Ox1UA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Just announced: American Patriots to Headline 2019 Fall Dinner!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=afeb2861d5)
---
| |
---
| Just announced! Congressmen and combat veterans Dan Crenshaw (R-TX), Brian Mast (R-FL) and Jim Baird (R-IN) will be the special guests at the 2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

You might remember this trio from a [tweet posted by Congressman Mast](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4409982b79&e=1acd9bb3d6) in January -- with the caption "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." It went viral and brought much attention not only to these fine patriots, but to all American veterans who have served their nation.

Learn more about the event and secure your ticket [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8820948fd5&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

If you have questions, contact Zach at [ZachWillis@HolcombforIndiana.com](mailto:ZachWillis@HolcombforIndiana.com)!
---
|

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Join Presidential Candidate, Joe Sestak, in Wayne on Friday, September 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Rob Armstrong, George Badey, Ed Chacker, Shelly Chauncey,
Mark and Karin Cofone, Andrea and Mark D’Ambra, Ken Dilloway, Larry Frame, Margaret Goodman, Grant Grissom, Elayne Howard, Bob Jarvis, Scott Jenkins, Janet Lis, Kevin Madden, William C. Miller, William E. Miller, Esq., David Moldoff, Jack Nachamkin, Gary Neights, Abu and Shelly Rahman, Richard Sternhell, Mark Turner & Ava Zandi

Cordially invite you to a Fundraiser Reception on Friday, September 6, to meet
Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak at Margaret Kuo's Restaurant in Wayne, PA

Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [https://iowastartingline.com/2019/07/29/the-peculiar-surprisingly-effective-campaign-of-joe-sestak/] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”

Vox called Joe [https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2019/8/13/20680106/joe-sestak-2020-presidential-campaign-policies-admiral-navy-specter-obama-medicare-public-option] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.” National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.

“Admiral Joe” has traveled across Iowa, from his first stop at Antioch Baptist Church in Waterloo through American Legions and Chambers of Commerce to parades and picnics, all the while passing out brochures and holding “Cup of Joe on the Issues” events.

Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district where he was reelected without spending a dime on campaign ads .

An independent-minded public servant, Joe also stood up to his party and refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary.

Please come join us to meet Joe and understand why he inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] , addressing education, jobs, economic protection, climate change, defense policy and seniors. Check out JoeSestak.com [https://www.joesestak.com] .

Friday, September 6th, 6:30 p.m.
Margaret Kuo's Restaurant
175 Lancaster Ave, Wayne, PA
RSVP: reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

If unable to attend, you may make a contribution online by clicking here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sestakreception] or by mailing a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8b8b0d79-7ac2-e911-bcd0-281878391efb/24d50193-a9c2-e911-bcd0-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ1MDE5My1hOWMyLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hKImWbvkMambfAQHo2p5slr85nBUrDh4Ip1Ka6RKDDw=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: Team Tate
subject: Bill Waller's TRUE opinion of Mississippians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor | | [](http://mail
body:
You can show Mr. Waller what you think of his opinion of the people of Mississippi by casting your vote for Tate Reeves on August 27th [ ](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=90e7797f402b499db4e8f83190d390e1&_e=SuA89lQY4vdDbe0krN-3hkdiihPNqOYCBiGltKgEiX75KzQ2UrUSAOAry_ZA5GGdq6ixEgpip6DtgJOAsvFudzTLl2dtg6hliLy_N4tappOcyDpJO6gOp1pK8ilLx6kWnFq1Dhg182pZzPbOUR9onx3AJeNBe3P-7hYwMajQ8Jc0lWTRsxPS-a1VpAF2aAV1YeEEwZVnp_j0ziV1K-cMnjEcTWfMMpWozgc1n8tOBVnM9w_Zo0fzKa4DqO_lPKTYTueXj6keDuBISopjcQkkTa66XW_vby6E59x-w63QgmrBlPr75k-qXE1kupUkZlzs11GmQihjHaYoIvqueOjVOfozX_jCMY_69FTIpxoithg%3D) Everyone, If you want to know Bill Waller’s real opinions about voters in Mississippi, what better source than the man himself? Waller, who lost 76 of Mississippi’s 82 counties in the primary election, praises those “close to the capitol” for allowing him to advance into the runoff. According to him, only these voters in Jackson are:
* Informed
* “Read up”
* Able to “understand what the issues are” and what “effective governance is”

You read that right. He thinks the only informed voters are the ones in Jackson.

You can see the video for yourself here. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: USMCA is 21st-Century Enhancement America Needs
body:
"NAFTA is now more than 25 years old and in need of an update." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b26c5a1cb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **USMCA is 21st-Century Enhancement America Needs**

“Just like the unseen parts used to make automobiles and airplanes work, the contributions of the Keystone State are often experienced — even if not always seen — every day around the world. The products manufactured in Pennsylvania help make the world function, but all of that could slow down if a critical trade agreement with our North American neighbors is not approved by Congress,” writes Jason Wilburn, president of Foerster Instruments, in the _Pittsburgh Tribune-Review_.

“NAFTA is now more than 25 years old and in need of an update . . . We need to cut the red tape and the arduous regulations that make it harder to do business. The USMCA does this for small manufacturers. If the USMCA is ratified, businesses like mine will be able to continue doing what we do best.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ec74f2b90&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Amid last week’s debate over whether Israel should have issued waivers to Democratic Reps. Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar, and allowed them to promote the anti-Israel boycott, divestment, and sanctions (BDS) movement from within Israel, two scandals went largely unreported. The first scandal is that Tlaib and Omar’s trip was planned by the antisemitic, pro-terror Miftah organization. The second scandal was the establishment media’s whitewashing of the first scandal,” Warren Henry writes for [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fed27ce5d4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| In [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3dec4aa3f&e=3ee4985eea), Heather Mac Donald explains who is really dividing Americans by race. “Mr. Trump rarely uses racial categories in his speech or his tweets. It is the media and Democratic leaders who routinely characterize individuals and groups by race and issue race-based denunciations of large parts of the American polity,” she writes.
---
|
---
| “Foreign individuals should not be allowed to come to America in order to take advantage of its welfare programs. This shouldn't be a controversial statement. Federal law currently reflects this position. The Trump administration has finalized a regulation aimed at better implementing this law,” the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8df4c6cb7d&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “In today’s debates over immigration, we find it necessary to state what should be self-evident: All American laws ought to serve the American people."
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump wrote a check to donate his second quarter 2019 salary to the office of the Surgeon General to fund an upcoming public health advisory . . . It’s his third salary donation to the Department of Health and Human Services,” Jayne O'Donnell reports for [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e0abb1c1c&e=3ee4985eea). “Trump pledged that he wouldn't accept his $400,000 annual presidential salary if elected. But because he has to be paid under law, he has been donating the payment to different [areas] of the federal government.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90411b362e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cbbf188340&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6de2be7e06)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: BREAKING (via Team Baer)
subject: Donald Trump just announced:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Trump is rushing to pass a rule allowing his government to fire LGBTQ+ employees for their sexual orientation.
|
---

| | **BREAKING: Trump Administration announces rule to to fire LGBTQ+ workers** | Trump's Department of Labor just announced a brand new rule encouraging employers to fire LBGTQ+ workers.

We can't let Trump get away with this deliberate, bigoted, homophobic attack just to rile up his far-right base. [**Sign Dan 's emergency petition DEMANDING Trump overturn his new rule. If we can reach 1,000 signatures before midnight tomorrow, Dan will personally deliver our signatures straight to the Department of Labor. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e5c/2254363386/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/lgbtq-protections-petition?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_brking_all")
---

This is a blatantly bigoted attack.

Trump is rushing to pass a rule allowing his government to fire LGBTQ+ employees for their sexual orientation.

Let us repeat that:

**If we let Trump get his way, LGBTQ+ workers will be at risk of losing their jobs because of who they are or who they love.**

We need to act now. And we need to fight back harder than we ever have before.

Will you sign Dan's emergency petition before midnight?

[**1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Our human rights are in jeopardy! We need an overwhelming show of support to demand Trump overturn his bigoted, dangerous, homophobic rule. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e5c/2254363386/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/lgbtq-protections-petition?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_brking_all")

This is personal.

We need to PROTECT workers from discrimination, not encourage employers to punish people because of their sexual orientation.

We immediately need your signature on Dan's critical petition before midnight:

[Quickly -- SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e5c/2254363386/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/lgbtq-protections-petition?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_brking_all")

Thank you,

Team Baer

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e5d/2254363386/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e42/2254363386/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e43/2254363386/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279f/232dfd1/9f370ac/62a13e41/2254363386/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

subject: Corey Lewandowski, Donald Trump, and Jeanne Shaheen

body:
Hi there,
**One of Donald Trump 's closest allies and the man who put him in the Oval Office, Corey Lewandowski, just announced that he might run against Senator Jeanne Shaheen for New Hampshire's other Senate seat.**
We told Jeanne we'd help her raise $10,000 to help fight back, but we're pretty far behind.
New Hampshire is a purple state, and this race could very easily decide Senate control. With The Washington Post saying that this seat is one of the most likely to flip, every dollar matters.

name: Gloria Steinem
subject: Reaching out to you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
Did you know that guaranteed entry into the presidential debates depends on the number of grassroots donors a candidate has?

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjE5NjgzNzIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTExNzQ0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Securing a spot at the September presidential debate depends on the number of grassroots donors a candidate has--no matter how much each donor gives.

The deadline for campaigns to submit their donor totals to the DNC is August 28, less than ten days from now.

Kirsten Gillibrand is my U.S. senator, and she is the all-time champion in getting the highest share of votes in my home state of New York. She is also a tireless, fierce fighter for reproductive freedom, and the only one on the debate stage with a comprehensive plan for publicly funded elections. Getting big money out of politics would change everything.

**It 's crucial that she becomes known to the rest of the country through these debates.** At the last debate, Kirsten used her time to speak out about white privilege, address the importance of tackling climate change, and to defend the _essential_ right of women to work outside the home.

We all need more of that in the next debate!

So please: **[_Make a donation to Kirsten 's campaign today and launch her to the debate stage before the DNC's deadline!_](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjE5NjgzNzIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTExNzQ0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Tim
subject: are you in my corner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
I'm working hard to get on that debate stage for you, folks.

As part of the DNC rules, **I need to hit 2% in four polls to qualify** -- and while I'm close, I still need your help to secure those numbers and with them, a spot on the debate stage in Houston.

[GET ME TO HOUSTON](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+GET+ME+TO+HOUSTON&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1")
My finance team tells me we've had a huge surge of support in the last month, but in order for me to get my message out there and garner more traction in the polls, [**I need my team (that means you!) to keep up the momentum.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+I+need+my+team+that+means+you+to+keep+up&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1")

The only way for me to make my case in front of the American people is by getting on that stage with the rest of the Democratic field. I know I have what it takes -- and I'm ready to debate the critical issues we are facing as a country -- but I need to know you are in my corner.

[**Help me reach 2% in the four polls I need to debate in Houston:**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Help+me+reach+2+in+the+four+polls+I+need&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1")****[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/Houston**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomHouston&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_1_1_T1")

Thanks!

Tim

|

name: Toss-up alert via VPP
subject: [important] Susan Collins update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter -- this is a HUGE break in our chances to take down Republican Senator Susan Collins and flip the Senate. Collins proved that she cared more about sucking up to Trump than protecting survivors when she voted to put accused sexual assailant Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court -- and her support has PLUMMETED since then..- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- this is a HUGE break in our chances to take down Republican Senator Susan Collins and flip the Senate: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f4/72412298/406e597c/6102ed25/1995017328/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDgxOV9jb2xsaW5zdG9zc3VwX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzeU5YMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190819_collinstossup_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190819_collinstossup_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190819_collinstossup_U1_X1") Collins proved that she cared more about sucking up to Trump than protecting survivors when she voted to put accused sexual assailant Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court --_**and her support has PLUMMETED since then.**_ But Collins has received nearly $8 million in corporate PAC money -- so we won't be able to win in 2020 if we don't flood grassroots donations to her competitor, Maine's Democratic Speaker of the House Sara Gideon. name: Team Nicole
subject: Breaking News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Nicole was just named to the NRCC Young Guns list.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKPXFTCetGwge4-59ndetVQ9yky2-vLo94N1gi9nTvHD_qyYHdA9P2YrCPiHP4E65ScmVW84u4XYlrRjUCVTKir7dqXEd77zgvkpzaiXaNiPsNGG1JA_ETTxCv3SB5kOlEN4qMmBHadmLOLDcqJ05A==&c=HLGDjq4zArgdl4ApYUIdqkZXn-WIBQdYPRASLIBJIhMJ4KT0fG80Fw==&ch=3fwwsd9n3EbXuJMkbFlwC8hNcQv7IZxUPypQU6Xfv_cCgXJEuPDygQ==)
---
| The campaign just found out that Nicole was one of 43 candidates running for Congress to be named to the National Republican Congressional Committee's Young Guns list. Young Guns was established by Leader McCarthy to support promising candidates. This shows that not only is Nicole's campaign off to a great start building a strong grassroots organization to win, but that this race will be a top target next year.
---
| |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKPXFTCetGwge4-59ndetVQ9yky2-vLo94N1gi9nTvHD_qyYHdA9P_g6UDZHBx_BQe4UpQfCyWYbcm8tJYBL_-Q0HLik6zm6-7nCxbm8vba4_uWv2gtku6NX8LFMPtmK7Zc-zcEoZjkoXLuip99NMPokhDKNl64yNnE3QkKOtePmOsy0lIqczibi-XHIjEC0lSfx1Yxc84HRYYujQIAZvMmelLk9_NoPN3yj6v9O1svv6KliKxDqcsHytKcv3YcOULvVb_dCy_gUiIUFfNH-MdF49E5B-hhq&c=HLGDjq4zArgdl4ApYUIdqkZXn-WIBQdYPRASLIBJIhMJ4KT0fG80Fw==&ch=3fwwsd9n3EbXuJMkbFlwC8hNcQv7IZxUPypQU6Xfv_cCgXJEuPDygQ==)
---
| |
---
| The strength of this campaign is you, her loyal supporters. Your contributions and those of more than 25,000 fellow supporters are what have helped put her on the NRCC's Young Guns' list. As big of news as this is, it is also a wake-up call. The Democrats have already begun attacking Nicole with false ads about her position on healthcare. Now they will double down with their negative attacks to try and stop our momentum. We know you have already given to this campaign, but we must ask you to help match what Max Rose and his liberal Washington DC allies will do to stop our momentum. Will you [double down](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKPXFTCetGwge4-59ndetVQ9yky2-vLo94N1gi9nTvHD_qyYHdA9P_g6UDZHBx_BQe4UpQfCyWYbcm8tJYBL_-Q0HLik6zm6-7nCxbm8vba4_uWv2gtku6NX8LFMPtmK7Zc-zcEoZjkoXLuip99NMPokhDKNl64yNnE3QkKOtePmOsy0lIqczibi-XHIjEC0lSfx1Yxc84HRYYujQIAZvMmelLk9_NoPN3yj6v9O1svv6KliKxDqcsHytKcv3YcOULvVb_dCy_gUiIUFfNH-MdF49E5B-hhq&c=HLGDjq4zArgdl4ApYUIdqkZXn-WIBQdYPRASLIBJIhMJ4KT0fG80Fw==&ch=3fwwsd9n3EbXuJMkbFlwC8hNcQv7IZxUPypQU6Xfv_cCgXJEuPDygQ==) for Nicole by matching your last contribution or whatever you can afford today?
---
| |
---
| | | [DOUBLE DOWN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKPXFTCetGwge4-59ndetVQ9yky2-vLo94N1gi9nTvHD_qyYHdA9P_g6UDZHBx_BQe4UpQfCyWYbcm8tJYBL_-Q0HLik6zm6-7nCxbm8vba4_uWv2gtku6NX8LFMPtmK7Zc-zcEoZjkoXLuip99NMPokhDKNl64yNnE3QkKOtePmOsy0lIqczibi-XHIjEC0lSfx1Yxc84HRYYujQIAZvMmelLk9_NoPN3yj6v9O1svv6KliKxDqcsHytKcv3YcOULvVb_dCy_gUiIUFfNH-MdF49E5B-hhq&c=HLGDjq4zArgdl4ApYUIdqkZXn-WIBQdYPRASLIBJIhMJ4KT0fG80Fw==&ch=3fwwsd9n3EbXuJMkbFlwC8hNcQv7IZxUPypQU6Xfv_cCgXJEuPDygQ==)
---
| |
---
| Your support and grassroots contribution mean more to Nicole than anything. Any help you could give to our ["Double Down" matching campaign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKPXFTCetGwge4-59ndetVQ9yky2-vLo94N1gi9nTvHD_qyYHdA9P_g6UDZHBx_BQe4UpQfCyWYbcm8tJYBL_-Q0HLik6zm6-7nCxbm8vba4_uWv2gtku6NX8LFMPtmK7Zc-zcEoZjkoXLuip99NMPokhDKNl64yNnE3QkKOtePmOsy0lIqczibi-XHIjEC0lSfx1Yxc84HRYYujQIAZvMmelLk9_NoPN3yj6v9O1svv6KliKxDqcsHytKcv3YcOULvVb_dCy_gUiIUFfNH-MdF49E5B-hhq&c=HLGDjq4zArgdl4ApYUIdqkZXn-WIBQdYPRASLIBJIhMJ4KT0fG80Fw==&ch=3fwwsd9n3EbXuJMkbFlwC8hNcQv7IZxUPypQU6Xfv_cCgXJEuPDygQ==) now would be appreciated. Thank you for your efforts. Let's keep the momentum going.
-Team Nicole
---

clean_body: Nicole was just named to the NRCC Young Guns list. | | | | | | == | The campaign just found out that Nicole was one of 43 candidates running for Congress to be named to the National Republican Congressional Committee's Young Guns list. Young Guns was established by Leader McCarthy to support promising candidates. This shows that not only is Nicole's campaign off to a great start building a strong grassroots organization to win, but that this race will be a top target next year. | | | == | | | The strength of this campaign is you, her loyal supporters. Your contributions and those of more than 25,000 fellow supporters are what have helped put her on the NRCC's Young Guns' list. As big of news as this is, it is also a wake-up call. The Democrats have already begun attacking Nicole with false ads about her position on healthcare. Now they will double down with their negative attacks to try and stop our momentum. We know you have already given to this campaign, but we must ask you to help match what Max Rose and his liberal Washington DC allies will do to stop our momentum. Will you == for Nicole by matching your last contribution or whatever you can afford today? | | | | | == | | | Your support and grassroots contribution mean more to Nicole than anything. Any help you could give to our == now would be appreciated. Thank you for your efforts. Let's keep the momentum going. -Team Nicole | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) | | | == == == | | Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306 | | Sent by mailto:info@nicoleforny.com

name: Tim Kaine
subject: 78 days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek: The last few weeks have been really difficult for this country. The pain of grieving for those who lost loved ones in the mass shootings in El Paso and Dayton was made even worse by the frustration of knowing there is so much more we can do to prevent these types of attacks. The spread of white supremacist terrorism -- stoked by the president of the United States -- combined with all-too-easy access to firearms has made our country woefully unsafe. But we're not powerless to change this country for the better -- even in the face of devastation and difficulty. We are now just 78 days away from the 2019 elections here in the Commonwealth, where we have a real shot at flipping the General Assembly and securing forward progress for Virginia families. Here's why I'm ready to turn the legislature blue in November:
* We have incredible Democrats stepping up to run for House and Senate seats in Virginia -- activists, organizers and longtime fighters for our shared values.
* A Democratic majority will give leaders in Richmond the chance to pass legislation that will make a difference in people's lives, whether they're students, workers, parents -- or all three.
* Virginia is a bellwether for what is to come across the country. That means we have an opportunity this November to steer the politics of our entire country towards progress.

And although we have incredible candidates, they can't flip the General Assembly on their own -- and that's where you come in. [**Will you sign my petition today to say you 're ready to elect a Democratic majority in November?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176f/3e0906/78ece98f/3e30e1a2/3128214923/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tim-kaines-petition?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+sign+my+petition+today+to+say+y&utm_campaign=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA&source=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA") | ******[**ADD MY NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176f/3e0906/78ece98f/3e30e1a1/3128214923/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tim-kaines-petition?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+ADD+MY+NAME&utm_campaign=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA&source=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA")******
---
We have so much momentum from kicking off the blue wave in our historic 2017 elections and helping flip the House in 2018, and I know we can keep the wins coming. So I'm committed to doing everything I can to help our House and Senate candidates deliver victories across the state for Virginians. But I need your help.
[**Sign my petition to say you 're ready to turn Virginia even more blue -- and that you're ready to join me and Democrats across the state in working to make that happen.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176f/3e0906/78ece98f/3e30e1a0/3128214923/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tim-kaines-petition?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Sign+my+petition+to+say+yoursquore+ready&utm_campaign=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA&source=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA")
Thank you for all your work,

-Tim Kaine

**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
* * *
|

We believe that emails are a crucial way for Tim to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176f/3e0906/78ece98f/3e30e1bb/3128214923/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA&source=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA")

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176f/3e0906/78ece98f/3e30e1ba/3128214923/VEsP/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA&source=20190819_OB_PET_TK_FGA") Thanks for having Tim's back!

P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313-0239

name: Tina Smith
subject: What should I try at the fair? 🥪☕️🍪🍕
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The Great Minnesota Get Together kicks off this week. And just like last year, I want your vote on which new food I should eat.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190819statefair-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

I am so excited for the Minnesota State Fair!

I cannot wait to check out my favorite vendors, see familiar faces at my team's booth, and explore what's new on the fairgrounds. But most importantly, I love trying out all of the delicious food that the state fair has to offer.

I am going to be honest with you, I had so much fun last year when you decided what food I tried at the fair. So much so that we're doing it again this year!

**[Cast your vote for what I should try at the state fair this year -- afterwards we'll send around a video of me eating (or drinking) at the booth of our winner!](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://tinasmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/state-fair?source=em190819statefair-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://tinasmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/state-fair?source=em190819statefair-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
_Photos from mnstatefair.org_ Here's a little more detail about the items on my short list:
* **Grilled Sota Sandwich:** Cinnamon nut butter and Minnesota blueberry marmalade served warm on Irish soda bread
* **Nordic Strawberry Blonde Ale:** This easy-drinking berry brew is made for Minnesota Nordics -- it's light, smooth and refreshing
* **Nordic Waffles in Pebbles and Bam Bam:** Fresh-made waffle wraps with warm Reese's chocolate peanut butter cups and fruity cereal
* **Jamm'in Brisket Grilled Cheese:** Slow-smoked brisket, red onion jam, cheddar and pepper jack cheeses, and RC's hot bbq sauce
* **Kora's Cookie Dough:** Serving deep-fried chocolate chip cookie dough and five flavors of cookie dough on a stick
* **Turkish Pizza:** A Turkish-style cracker-thin flatbread topped with spicy minced beef, onion, tomato, lettuce, cucumber salad, parsley, fresh herbs, a squeeze of lemon and garlic sauce, then rolled or folded

Remember, there are no bad choices in this mix. Some food on a stick options, some twists on the classics, and some totally original additions.

I still have my eyes on enjoying some fried green tomatoes, but that's a given. I want to get a taste for what's new!

**[Let me know what you think looks good! Vote before the fair kicks off on Thursday.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://tinasmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/state-fair?source=em190819statefair-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks and I hope to see you there,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190819statefair-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ed22/c1f7015/64b8bd64/11461924/3916883144/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Underwood=20Jacobs?=
subject: Have you heard?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela Underwood Jacobs for Congress
body:
Angela Underwood Jacobs Named to NRCC’s Young Guns “On the Radar” List | | | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=beb2a26c70&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
| | **Have you heard the news?**
---
| | Last week, Angela was named to the NRCC's Young Guns "On the Radar" list - an honor only **43 candidates from around the country** received.
---
| [Rush your donation to congratulate Angela ->>](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=a79e1fc966&e=ec66c3b29a "Rush your donation to congratulate Angela ->>")
---
| Our race is being highlighted as one of the **top** **races in the country**. This is a huge step forward for our campaign, but we'll need your help to advance to the _next level_ of the Young Guns program.

We're setting an ambitious fundraising goal to ensure that we make the next cut, but Angela needs every dollar we can raise to show Katie Hill and her socialist allies that **we're the candidate to beat in 2020. **
**[Now that we've caught the NRCC's attention, can we count on you?](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=f1dd814852&e=ec66c3b29a)**

We're more than **halfway through** our fundraising quarter, and we need support from people like you to bring Republican leadership back the 25th District.
_**[Will you help us WIN this race in 2020?](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=200a9464d2&e=ec66c3b29a)**_
---
| Every dollar you donate goes directly toward Angela's mission to fight for a better life for the people of the 25th Congressional District!
---
| [Join Angela's Victory Team ->>](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=652c6724eb&e=ec66c3b29a "Join Angela's Victory Team ->>")

---
**About Angela Underwood Jacobs:**

Underwood Jacobs currently serves as the regional Senior Vice President of California Bank and Trust, where she helps Californians live their _American Dream_ – purchase their first home, receive a loan to launch a small business, or save for retirement. Underwood Jacobs was the first African American woman elected to the Lancaster City Council, where she has served since 2015. She is the proud wife of a military veteran and a mother that has lived in Antelope Valley for over 25 years.

name: Trump Victory
subject: Day of Action!
body:
| |

| Derek, The President was just in Manchester on Thursday. Did you get a chance to go? The arena was packed and there were thousands more people outside. Our President was very clear: _we can and will win New Hampshire_ , but we need your help to keep that momentum and energy going. We have a team on the ground that is working _right now_ to make that happen. Can you help them? Trump Victory is organizing and building for 2020 to make sure that the President and Republicans across the state are elected. We cannot let radical Democrats in Concord add new taxes and skyrocket spending in our state, when our economy is booming under President Trump and Governor Sununu. You can help us by [attending a training](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI2MTk4MDE1NzQ4ODcyMDQzJmM9dDhqNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzEwOTc1NjImZD1tMnEydjdl.rWhSlMpzPMuzffo0OACaVHAgjQsGaX9zb9Kc94rDWJw)! This week we are joining Women for Trump to celebrate our women supporters, volunteers, and candidates, but all our welcome. You will learn about one of the most important ways you can help the President here in N.H., which is talking to other voters. These trainings will happen across the state on Thursday, August 22nd. **Windham Senior Center** 3 N. Lowell Rd. Windham, NH 6PM – 7:30PM [RSVP HERE](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI2MTk4MDE1NzQ4ODcyMDQzJmM9dDhqNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzEwOTc1NjYmZD1yMWo4cDFy.MdmrpMfQu2s_wBA06VaCb2Vib3xaHpTTbG3mC7bnduE) **Victoria Sullivan Campaign Office** 62 Lowell St. Suite 5 Manchester, NH 03101 6PM - 7PM [RSVP HERE](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI2MTk4MDE1NzQ4ODcyMDQzJmM9dDhqNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzEwOTc1NzYmZD14OXU0ZjNy.gm3KKodGrf6HTJifugJrl_pIvO_yK_bXCZZ9NilGtyA) **Laconia Public Library** 695 North Main Street Laconia, NH 03246 6PM – 7PM [RSVP Here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI2MTk4MDE1NzQ4ODcyMDQzJmM9dDhqNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzEwOTc1NzgmZD1vNmsxYzFl.eUQQtvIY96ouju82fBli31E6pZSMQWnr48BbSj1BnGI) **Old County Courthouse- Commissioner’s Room** 33 Winter St. Keene, NH 03431 7PM - 8:30PM [RSVP HERE](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI2MTk4MDE1NzQ4ODcyMDQzJmM9dDhqNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzEwOTc1ODAmZD1tOGc0aDNo.RCBVi2aQAdwKZzJZrYk3u09QSpnK0DtrFR-uEHCPtjc) Thank you for you continued support and we look forward to seeing you at a training soon! Sincerely, Trump Victory NH

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: BIG ENDORSEMENT: (Elizabeth Warren & Ed Markey!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **team: Elizabeth Warren just endorsed Ed Markey for re-election to the Senate!**

Check out her endorsement video!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Elizabeth is endorsing Ed because she knows he's a leader, he's a fighter, and he's a true progressive.

On climate change, Ed is leading the movement for the Green New deal. He has spent his career as our country's greatest champion for clean energy jobs, and as Big Oil's greatest nightmare.

It's Ed's gun legislation that would make Massachusetts' strong laws a model for the entire country.

When it comes to health care, Ed is fighting to lower drug costs, make universal healthcare a reality, and ensure protections for those with pre-existing conditions.

Ed is our greatest champion in the Senate when it comes to big issues facing Massachusetts - from economic justice, to net neutrality, and reproductive freedom; Ed is leading the most important fights.

Elizabeth is counting on Ed to win in 2020--she will need her partner in the U.S. Senate to stand up for our progressive values.

**That 's why we've set a big endorsement goal of $50,000 in 48 hours to help send Ed back to the Senate to fight for us.**

_**[Will you stand with Elizabeth Warren today and pitch in $27 or more to support Ed?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: SENATE ALERT (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: Mitch McConnell just confirmed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 10,000 signatures on his emergency petition to stop McConnell's dangerous court-packing. We MUST prevent Trump's hatred from spreading throughout our entire justice syst
---
| | **BREAKING: McConnell rushes 99 Trump judges through Senate** **[10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: We need to act NOW. Sign the emergency petition to STOP McConnell from packing our courts with Trump 's dangerous judges. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffee/2299142642/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_sav_all")** | Quickly -- Mitch McConnell just fast-tracked an alarming number of Trump judges through the Senate.

**If we don 't act NOW -- these judges will carry out Trump's dangerous agenda on the bench for generations to come.** [_**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 10,000 signatures on his emergency petition to stop McConnell 's dangerous court-packing. We MUST prevent Trump's hatred from spreading throughout our entire justice system. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffee/2299142642/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_sav_all") **NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ** ** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffee/2299142642/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_sav_all")**
---

This is downright alarming.

Mitch McConnell is sabotaging our court system at a blazing place.

He just rushed 99 -- _NINETY-NINE_ \-- Trump judges through the Senate.

**99** far right judges who will roll back our health care.

**99** dangerous judges who will uphold Trump's cruel, hateful policies.

**99** Trump judges who will have LIFETIME appointments to carry out his orders.

After Mitch McConnell stole President Obama's Supreme Court seat -- we can't let him hand Trump the rest of our justice system, too.

[_**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign Ben Ray 's emergency petition. We MUST stop McConnell and Trump from packing the courts and sabotaging our entire justice system. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffee/2299142642/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190819_em_pet_b1_sav_all")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffef/2299142642/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffec/2299142642/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffed/2299142642/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffe2/2299142642/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffe3/2299142642/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4e2/18e32a7f/555c9cf0/7bdfffe0/2299142642/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

body:

name: Kamala Harris For The People
subject: You’ve been selected to take a survey »
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Soon, Kamala will begin preparing for the September debate -- another critical milestone for our campaign. We want to do everything to help put her in a position to succeed, which is why we’re asking: **[Can you take our two-minute pre-debate survey? Our records indicate you’re one of Kamala’s most active supporters, which is why your feedback is so important. Your answers will be critical to our debate prep.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190818-survey-predebate?refcode=ema190819-full&source=ema190819-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=6001%2E5755789%2EW5kFeO)** [](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190818-survey-predebate?refcode=ema190819-full&source=ema190819-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=6001%2E5755789%2EW5kFeO) | | [ TAKE OUR SURVEY »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190818-survey-predebate?refcode=ema190819-full&source=ema190819-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=6001%2E5755789%2EW5kFeO)
---
Before the July presidential debate, we asked supporters to take a survey similar to this one -- here’s what you told us:
* An overwhelming majority of respondents want a candidate who can stand up to defeat Donald Trump in the general;

* Health care and climate change were the top issues;

* Many folks were excited about Kamala holding her own against attacks from some of our primary opponents.

But we know the ground is always shifting in politics, which is why we need to ask you take this survey before Kamala starts preparing for the presidential debate that’s coming up in September:
**[Will you take our initial pre-debate survey and help Kamala prepare for the debates next month? This is important.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190818-survey-predebate?refcode=ema190819-full&source=ema190819-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=4&akid=6001%2E5755789%2EW5kFeO)**
| [ TAKE OUR SURVEY »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190818-survey-predebate?refcode=ema190819-full&source=ema190819-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=5&akid=6001%2E5755789%2EW5kFeO)
---
Thanks for making your voice heard. Trust us when we tell you that these surveys make a real difference for our team and that we’ll be sending Kamala a summary of your feedback. Thanks again!
— Team Kamala
| [ TAKE OUR SURVEY »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190818-survey-predebate?refcode=ema190819-full&source=ema190819-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=6&akid=6001%2E5755789%2EW5kFeO)
---

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Sign my petition to tell the Trump Administration to protect critical clean air protections →
body:
We have to fight back.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dcc/4bef7a87/68793bbc/287f6db5/3679705895/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Tell Trump:**
**We need clean air protections to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.**
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dcc/4bef7a87/68793bbc/287f6db4/3679705895/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/power-plant-petition?source=em190819-full")****
Friends,
Fossil-fueled power plants are a _major_ source of the greenhouse gases that are altering our climate.
And yet, the Trump Administration recently announced their plans to roll back clean air protections, allowing power plants to continue polluting our air and warming our Earth.
There's good news, though:
Maine - along with 21 other states - is suing the Trump Administration over their decision to roll back these clean air protections!
Will you lend your voice to our fight? We need as many people as possible to speak out:
[**Sign my petition and tell the Trump Administration to stop trying to roll back critical clean air protections.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dcc/4bef7a87/68793bbc/287f6db4/3679705895/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/power-plant-petition?source=em190819-full")
The truth is, climate change won't wait for us. It's already here, and we need to move quickly if we're going to have a chance at stopping it.
So thank you for taking action on this important issue.
Yours,
-_Sara_
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dcc/4bef7a87/68793bbc/287f6db4/3679705895/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/power-plant-petition?source=em190819-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dcc/4bef7a87/68793bbc/287f6d8b/3679705895/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dcc/4bef7a87/68793bbc/287f6d8a/3679705895/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Ed Markey
subject: Thrilled to have the support of my partner in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello - I'm thrilled to have Elizabeth Warren's endorsement for my re-election campaign in 2020.

We've fought side-by-side in the Senate to defend our progressive values, and together we'll continue to fight until we've restored our values from the White House to the Senate floor.

_**[I hope you'll consider standing with me today and help us reach our big goal of $50,000 in the next 48 hours. Every dollar you can spare will help keep Massachusetts in Democratic hands.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

\--Ed

Read more from Ed's campaign:
* * *
**team: Elizabeth Warren just endorsed Ed Markey for re-election to the Senate!**

Check out her endorsement video!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Elizabeth is endorsing Ed because she knows he's a leader, he's a fighter, and he's a true progressive.

On climate change, Ed is leading the movement for the Green New deal. He has spent his career as our country's greatest champion for clean energy jobs, and as Big Oil's greatest nightmare.

It's Ed's gun legislation that would make Massachusetts strong laws a model for the entire country.

When it comes to health care, Ed is fighting to lower drug costs, make universal healthcare a reality, and ensure protections for those with pre-existing conditions.

Ed is our greatest champion in the Senate when it comes to big issues facing Massachusetts - from economic justice, to net neutrality, and reproductive freedom; Ed is leading the most important fights.

Elizabeth is counting on Ed to win in 2020--she will need her partner in the U.S. Senate to stand up for our progressive values.

**That 's why we've set a big endorsement goal of $50,000 in 48 hours to help send Ed back to the Senate to fight for us.**

_**[Will you stand with Elizabeth Warren today and pitch in $27 or more to support Ed?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Team Tim
subject: fw: Tim's message about Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Hey there team,

Did you see Tim's message about the upcoming debate in Houston? He's working non stop to make sure he gets the support he needs to qualify -- but he can't do it without you. Your momentum is what keeps this campaign moving -- and what will deliver Tim the 2% in the four polls he needs to get on that stage:

[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/Houston**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomHouston&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")

**Begin Forwarded Message:**
> I'm working hard to get on that debate stage for you, folks.
>
> As part of the DNC rules, **I need to hit 2% in four polls to qualify** -- and while I'm close, I still need your help to secure those numbers and with them, a spot on the debate stage in Houston.
>
> [GET ME TO HOUSTON](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+GET+ME+TO+HOUSTON&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")
> My finance team tells me we've had a huge surge of support in the last month, but in order for me to get my message out there and garner more traction in the polls, [**I need my team (that means you!) to keep up the momentum.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+I+need+my+team+that+means+you+to+keep+up&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")
>
> The only way for me to make my case in front of the American people is by getting on that stage with the rest of the Democratic field. I know I have what it takes -- and I'm ready to debate the critical issues we are facing as a country -- but I need to know you are in my corner.
>
> [**Help me reach 2% in the four polls I need to debate in Houston:**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Help+me+reach+2+in+the+four+polls+I+need&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")****[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/Houston**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomHouston&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")
>
> Thanks!
>
> Tim
>
>

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d87/5486deaa/3d6d4cb3/dc8d420/1338581008/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")

**We know email can be overwhelming,**
so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d87/5486deaa/3d6d4cb3/dc8d423/1338581008/VEsB/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d87/5486deaa/3d6d4cb3/dc8d422/1338581008/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIzZDZkNGNiMyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTlkODcifQ==/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/3d6d4cb3/d7a9d87?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190819_2_2_T1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Video: Border Patrol agents rescue 28 illegal aliens
body:
These kinds of heroic acts are the sort of stories that don’t make the mainstream news much anymore. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=097948c897&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 19, 2019
---
| | |
# **Video: Border Patrol agents rescue 28 illegal aliens**
---
| **On Thursday,** U.S. Border Patrol agents saved the lives of 28 illegal immigrants as they attempted to cross the Rio Grande River into America.

**These kinds of heroic acts** —U.S. law enforcement officers putting their own lives at risk to save others—are the sort of stories that don’t make the news much anymore. Corporate media profits much more from division and anger than they do from uniting Americans.

**🎬****Watch:** [U.S. Border Patrol rescues 28 illegal aliens that smugglers abandoned](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bcdd7a47b1&e=3ee4985eea)

**These illegal aliens** were the victims of human smugglers and included 14 children ranging from 8 months to 17 years of age. After they were left stranded in high-current waters, U.S. Border Patrol agents acted swiftly, pulling the Honduran nationals into their vessel and out of harm’s way.

**“These individuals** found themselves in a life-threating situation, which is unfortunate and far too common as smugglers continue to show no empathy for people they attempt to cross illegally into the United States,” Del Rio Sector Chief Patrol Agent Raul Ortiz said.

**“Had our agents** not been there to provide rescue efforts, the situation could have ended in tragedy.”

[Read more: ICE offices, workers hit by wave of violence and threats](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06c68f728b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Remembering the forgotten men and women of America**

**It wasn’t long ago** that Washington had all but given up on our country’s blue-collar workers—especially those in the supposedly outdated manufacturing and energy sectors. The message that the “experts” tried to sell was that these industries were in decline, and with the rise of globalization, nothing could be done to change that.

**Former President Obama** even famously mocked then-candidate Donald J. Trump’s pledge to bring these jobs back. “What magic wand do you have?” President Obama asked. It turns out no magic wand was necessary—just a President who was willing to fight for forgotten workers across our country with policies that put U.S. industry first.

**🎬****Watch:** [President Trump tours new Pennsylvania manufacturing plant](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc21c17d55&e=3ee4985eea)

**From day one,** President Trump challenged the Beltway’s prevailing wisdom and unleashed a policy agenda that’s made life easier for America’s small businesses. Employer and worker tax cuts, deregulation, and new trade deals have helped create more than _6.2 million_ jobs and driven the unemployment rate to a near 50-year low.

**While President Trump toured** Shell’s new Pennsylvania Petrochemicals Complex, he explained that it’s a new dawn for American energy and manufacturing.

**“With your help,** we’re not only unleashing American energy—we’re restoring the glory of American manufacturing, and we are reclaiming our noble heritage as a nation of builders again,” he told factory workers. All the while, the critics “expected you to stay on the sidelines, silence your voices, and surrender the future of our nation.”

**By 2020** , the United States is now predicted to export more energy than it imports for the first time since 1953. Today, we're also the largest crude oil producer in the world.

**Blue-collar jobs** are surging for the first time in decades. All told, 523,000 manufacturing jobs have been added since President Trump took office. Only 287,000 were created during all of President Obama’s final three years as commander in chief.

**Speaking in Detroit today,** Vice President Mike Pence explained why. “Wages are rising at the fastest pace in more than a decade,” he told the Detroit Economic Club. “And maybe most important of all to the President and me: that wages are rising fastest for blue-collar working Americans. The forgotten men and women of America are forgotten no more.”

[By the numbers: American energy and manufacturing is back!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8fb07b4f00&e=3ee4985eea)

**David Urban:** [“Trump has kept his promise to revive manufacturing.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06eb86f463&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---

| **President Donald J. Trump talks to reporters at Morristown Municipal Airport in New Jersey prior to boarding Air Force One for Washington, D.C.** | August 18, 2019

|

We recently hit a big milestone in this campaign: We passed 10,000 online donors, and I am so grateful to you and all of the supporters who helped us get here.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Back on the road, and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I’ll keep this short, because we’re still on the road. Last week we resumed our campaign, and we need to make up for lost time.
#
I’ll keep this short, because we’re still out on the road.
We paused campaigning for a couple weeks after an act of terror in my hometown. We wanted to fully focus on helping the community of El Paso to heal. Doing everything we possibly could to be present. Not allowing this to be politics as usual.
But pausing the campaign also meant pausing our fundraising. On Thursday morning, we resumed our campaign. And we need to make up for lost time in order to stay out on the road bringing everyone in, writing no one off, and taking no one for granted. I’m told that we need to raise another $500k, and we’re at about $266k as of writing this email. I’ve been incredibly impressed by all of your commitment in the past few days. But we still have a ways to go:
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26762?refcode=ema20190819-49933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=49933%2E444211%2E2qVl1t)
[Can you help right now? Add a $5 contribution to help us reach that goal as soon as possible.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26762?refcode=ema20190819-49933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=49933%2E444211%2E2qVl1t)
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26762?refcode=ema20190819-49933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=49933%2E444211%2E2qVl1t)**
Each and every single donation, no matter how large or how small, makes a big difference when you’re running a campaign without taking a dime from PACs, special interests, or D.C. lobbyists. Thank you for everything.
\- Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=49933%2E444211%2E2qVl1t). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.
