subject: Des Moines Register: Michael Bennet, truth teller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | [Iowa Caucus First Impressions: Michael Bennet pounds some truth into the campaign](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
[Des Moines Register 8/19/2019](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Friends, this is big!

The _Des Moines Register_ is crystal clear: "Iowa caucusgoers...would be well-served to give Bennet more attention. He offers a much-needed reality check on the promises candidates are offering and what it will take to accomplish meaningful change."

And one of the editorial board members described Michael as "a truth-teller -- someone on the inside who doesn't mince words about why everything is screwed up. And why sensible ideas like his don't ever get a hearing."

It's clear our momentum in Iowa is building.

[**Can you rush a donation today to help us continue getting Michael 's truth-telling message out and make sure he's on the next debate stage in Houston? We can't do it without you.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

| [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964edd/748768022/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Here are some of the _Des Moines Register 's_ other takeaways on Michael:

[**Healthcare:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") [Bennet] makes a forceful case against Sen. Bernie Sanders' "Medicare for All" proposal, which would eliminate private health insurance. Bennet's "Medicare X" plan is centered around adding a public option to the framework of the existing Affordable Care Act.

[**Education:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Bennet uses his experience as a former superintendent in Denver's public schools as a compass in his political life, saying he first considers how policy proposals would affect the students he used to serve. To that end, he says he'd prioritize federal assistance for states to offer free preschool over making college tuition free.

[**Immigration:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") As a member of the Senate "Gang of Eight" that got 68 Senate votes for bipartisan, comprehensive immigration reform legislation in 2013, Michael speaks with authority on the issue.

Michael knocked it out of the ballpark with this interview. But it's not news to us.

_We see it all the time._

When people hear Michael's message and vision around meaningful change, they realize exactly what people in Iowa did: [**Michael is a fierce truth teller.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Help us keep the momentum building.

[**Michael 's voice should be heard on every debate stage. With your help we can secure his spot, can we count on you?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac42/134673f2/ca626f1/69964ede/748768022/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

#
**To win in 2020, we have to cut through the noise coming out of Washington every single day.** We have to reach each of our supporters as effectively and quickly as possible to spread David’s outsider message.

Emails are one way to do that. **Text messages direct from David are another.**

[**As one of our top supporters, we’d love you to be one of the first to sign up for text alerts right now.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7951fcb7b1&e=02cd889ad3)

name: James Mackler
subject: Names. Addresses. Social Security Numbers. Credit scores.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Congress needs to take action to protect Americans' data.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa209/18d6a294/4b259e65/26d662c2/4277332219/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | | "Equifax data breach affected three million people in Tennessee" \- _Tennessean_
---
Names. Addresses. Social Security numbers. Credit scores.
These are all pieces of information stolen in recent large-scale data breaches that can upend the lives of millions of Americans, and we need to do something about it.
[**_Congress needs to take action to protect Americans ' data. Sign our petition if you agree ->_**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa209/18d6a294/4b259e65/26d662c3/4277332219/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190819")
| | [Add Your Name](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa209/18d6a294/4b259e65/26d662c3/4277332219/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190819")
---
The Equifax data breach back in 2017 affected more than 140 million people, including 3 million Tennesseans, and they're just now getting around to making amends. And just last month, a hacker stole the information of nearly 106 million Capital One customers.
As our technology advances, our data becomes more vulnerable to cyber attacks like these. And the attacks will only continue unless Congress does something about it.
But in the face of corporations' unethical practices, many of our representatives in Washington have chosen inaction to stay in the good graces of their corporate and special-interest donors. **I 'm done with that kind of bought-and-sold leadership. That's why I'm not taking money from corporate PACs**, because at the end of the day, I'm in this race to fight for Tennesseans and not mega-rich donors.
[**_Add your name to demand that Congress stand up to big corporations and take steps to protect against cyber attacks and data breaches._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa209/18d6a294/4b259e65/26d662c3/4277332219/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190819")
Thank you,
James

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. name: 2020 Senate Polling (via 314 Action)
subject: We need to get your response right now [we need 100 responses from your area]

body:
We HAVE to do everything we can to win the Senate in 2020. Colorado is one of the biggest battleground races -- If we don't win there, we won't flip the Senate.
---
| | We HAVE to do everything we can to win the Senate in 2020. Colorado is one of the biggest battleground races -- **If we don 't win there, we won't flip the Senate.** That's why we need you to answer our quick one-question poll: | [Do you think that John Hickenlooper can beat Cory Gardner in 2020?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66056/2001015612/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Do+you+think+that+John+Hickenlooper+can+&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
| | [Yes >> ](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66055/2001015612/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Yes+gtgt+&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
| | [No >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66054/2001015612/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+No+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
Cory Gardner is another Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump puppet who will vote however they do -- **He 's voted with Donald Trump nearly 90% of the time!**
We have to stop him. That's where Hick comes in.
John Hickenlooper, a geologist by training, achieved near universal healthcare access AND universal background checks during his tenure as governor. **And polling shows that Hick could beat Gardner, take away McConnell 's majority, and help flip the Senate in 2020!**
Take our instant survey: **[Do you think that Hick can beat Cory Gardener in 2020? >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66053/2001015612/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Do+you+think+that+Hick+can+beat+Cory+Gar&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")**
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66052/2001015612/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
This election won't be easy -- **Gardner has raised more than $8 MILLION toward his re-election and Mitch McConnell will be spending TENS of millions of dollars to defend his seat.**
We need to win -- and we know that John Hickenlooper is the ONLY Democrat that can lead us to victory. But we want to hear from you:
[Do you think that John Hickenlooper can beat Cory Gardner in 2020?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66051/2001015612/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Do+you+think+that+John+Hickenlooper+can+&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
| | [Yes >> ](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e66050/2001015612/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+Yes+gtgt+&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
| | [No >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e6605f/2001015612/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+No+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
Let's win this,
Draft Hick for Senate

| [www.drafthickforsenate.com](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e6605e/2001015612/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://drafthickforsenate.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+wwwdrafthickforsenatecom&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
---
| Draft Hick for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
---
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e6605d/2001015612/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_hicfooter?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e6605c/2001015612/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472a/4bd7760e/4dfaa410/77e6605b/2001015612/VEsHBw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190819_HIC1QPoll_U2_X1")

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: Elizabeth Warren is standing with Ed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **We wanted to make sure you saw this HUGE news:**

**Elizabeth Warren endorses Ed Markey:**

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Elizabeth is endorsing Ed because she knows he's a leader, he's a fighter, and he's a true progressive.

On climate change, Ed is leading the movement for the Green New deal. He has spent his career as our country's greatest champion for clean energy jobs, and as Big Oil's greatest nightmare.

It's Ed's gun legislation that would make Massachusetts strong laws a model for the entire country.

When it comes to health care, Ed is fighting to lower drug costs, make universal healthcare a reality, and ensure protections for those with pre-existing conditions.

Ed is our greatest champion in the Senate when it comes to big issues facing Massachusetts - from economic justice, to net neutrality, and reproductive freedom; Ed is leading the most important fights.

That's why she's standing behind Ed to help him win, and she's counting on you to do the same.

**We 've set a big endorsement goal of $50,000 in 48 hours to help send Ed back to the Senate to fight for us.**

_**[Will you stand with Elizabeth Warren today and pitch in $27 or more to support Ed?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-081919_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
